auth.signin.title: Sign in to your account
auth.signin.subtitle: Manage your properties with ease
auth.signin.credentials: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.signin.error: An error occurred during sign in
auth.signin.devClickToLogin: Click to instantly log in as that role
auth.signin.demoLead.intro: Thank you. Enter your details once so you can sign in to each demo role with one click. We keep your information confidential, we do not resell it, and for this step we store it only on your device.
auth.signin.demoLead.errorName: Please enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
auth.signin.demoLead.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number (at least 7 digits).
auth.signin.demoLead.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.signin.demoLead.errorSubmit: We could not save your details just now. Please check your connection and try again.
auth.signin.demoLead.unlockHint: Complete the form above to unlock one-click demo roles.
